hero.title: Cosmic
hero.description: Choose the perfect plan for your cosmic journey. All plans include our signature stellar service.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small businesses starting their cosmic journey

cosmic.name: Cosmic
cosmic.description: For growing brands ready to expand their universe

questions.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
questions.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade your plan at any time as your needs grow.

questions.question: Do you offer custom packages?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer fully customized packages for unique project requirements. Contact us for a personalized quote.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards, bank transfers, and PayPal.
